game scene: step 2.text:
Exactly!

Your journey was not easy, and lot's of times you thought about 
giving up.

But every time, 
you go back to, 
"that day".

ops.text:
Every time I remember that day, my blood boils.

(Path of resolution)

The single memory of that day is enough to send shivers down my spine.

(Path of fear)

game intro: step 3.text:
That day... That dreadful day when the dragon destroyed your fields.

The hard work of generation in your family turned to charcoal.

And the imposing dragon standing in front of you...

ops.text:
I'll never forget!

How could I...

The size of her pussy was enough to swallow my whole head...

I'll never forget!

How could I...

His dick was as long as myself and warm as a chimney...

game intro: step 4.text:
That image has since been imprinted in your very soul!

Yet you must stop daydreaming! ... and clean the drool from your face...

Come back to your sences! 
You have reached the dragon's realm.

ops.text: Let's get some dragon pussy!

I believe I made a mistake.   
Could we start over?
Let's get some dragon dick!

game-intro: intro.text:
Let's set the scene:

You are an adventurer in search of a dragon.

ops.text:
Cliche!

I want to be searching a three legged treant witch sap is the youth elixir.

And it will be called Norris 
because you must chuck their sap to live forever.

Yes!!

I am aware of this fact.

That dragon is not ready for the arrival of Aanon the knight!

The adventure will start in my house in a tree.

Norris was my best friend since time immemorial. 

But one day a hunter came by and took him away.

He would come out of nowhere and slap me to a duel.

But when the day and time came he left.

And by the rules of this world that means he took my dignity with him.

....

Sorry, did you say something?

I was thinking about Norris.

Since I couldn't let him keep my dignity, I started my quest for revenge.

But once I found him I realized that he has sold the dignity he stole from me.

All to keep his family fed.

From thick and thin I would follow the tracks.

Leaving my heart and soul in the chase of my only friend.
But what I was not expecting is that since Norris stopped giving me his sap, I had my days counted.

Since he had no more my dignity, I started chasing him so I could steal his dignity.

This proved too much for me, since he could live forever, and having three legs made him always be a step ahead.

...

Yeah I can hear you.

What made you believe I couldn't?.

What do you mean?

How would I know what happens in the future?

I am just an adventurer seeking a dragon.

Could you please continue with what you were saying?
I tried to follow him across the multiverse but my human body couldn't take it and I died.

Shortly after I started to feel exhausted, I saw my life before my eyes.

Since I've lived so much it was commically fast paced.

And I died.

game-intro: chuck path dead.text:
You died?

WTF!

You get out in a strange limb and now you die?

ops.text:
*dead noices*

(Game over)

Didn't you hear me?

I am dead!

I can't keep my adventure while dead!

(Game over)

game-intro: bail out of chuck.text:
Ok...

How about we go back to script?

ops.text:
A yeah...

Allow me to remove Norris from my mind...

...

I am... I am...
Oh! yea.

I am an adventurer seeking a dragon.

Nop!

That is borring.

See ya!

(Exit game)
